description: Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 6 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortGrey leather strap and a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite coloured dial with brand logo at 12 hour mark and branding at 6 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
